entry.title: Aserto
entry.description: Aserto provides cloud-native authorization as a service for building and managing fine-grained access control in applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 10,000 API calls per month and 3 tenants.

useCases: Add fine-grained authorization to SaaS apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Aserto account.
Create a new application in the Aserto dashboard.
Define your authorization policies using the built-in editor.
Integrate the Aserto SDK or REST API into your application.
Test access decisions and monitor usage in the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Aserto when you need to add or centralize fine-grained authorization in your applications without building it from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premise deployment, need support for more than 10,000 monthly API calls, or require strict SLAs.
entry.body: Aserto delivers managed authorization as a service, enabling developers to implement and manage fine-grained access control using policy-as-code and OPA compatibility.

entry.title: Asgardeo
entry.description: Asgardeo is a cloud-based identity and access management (IAM) service for secure authentication, authorization, and user management.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 1000 monthly active users and essential IAM features.
caveats: Support is limited on free tier

useCases: Add SSO to web and mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Asgardeo account.
Create a new application in the Asgardeo console.
Configure authentication methods (e.g., email, social login).
Integrate the Asgardeo SDK or use OAuth/OIDC endpoints in your app.
Test user login and access flows.
entry.whenToUse: Use Asgardeo when you need secure, managed authentication and SSO for your apps without building IAM infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premises IAM, advanced customization, or need to support more than 1000 monthly users for free.
entry.body: Asgardeo offers a managed IAM platform with SSO, OAuth2, OIDC, and SAML support, suitable for startups and teams needing secure authentication without complex setup.

entry.title: Azure Data Factory
entry.description: Azure Data Factory is a cloud-based data integration service for creating, scheduling, and orchestrating data pipelines at scale.

freeTierDetails.summary: 5 low-frequency activity runs and 1,000 Data Movement/Data Pipeline activity runs per month free.
caveats: Premium features and higher frequency runs are billed.
Data flow debug and SSIS integration not included.
billingRiskNotes: Exceeding free run limits incurs charges.
Some features may trigger additional costs.

useCases: Migrating data between cloud and on-premises
quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a Data Factory instance.
Set up linked services to connect to your data sources and destinations.
Create a pipeline and add activities for data movement or transformation.
Configure triggers to schedule pipeline runs.
Monitor pipeline execution and review run history.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to automate, schedule, or orchestrate data movement and transformation across diverse sources in Azure or hybrid environments.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited free runs, advanced data flows, or need a fully managed ETL with no risk of overages.
entry.body: Azure Data Factory provides scalable, cloud-based data integration and ETL capabilities with a limited always-free tier suitable for light workloads and evaluation.

entry.title: Azure Key Vault
entry.description: Azure Key Vault securely stores and manages secrets, keys, and certificates for your applications and services.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 10,000 operations per month for standard vaults.
limits: No charge for up to 10 enabled keys
No charge for up to 10 enabled secrets
caveats: Charges apply for additional operations or premium vaults
billingRiskNotes: Exceeding free limits incurs charges automatically

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure Portal and create a new Key Vault resource.
Set access policies to define who can manage or retrieve secrets.
Add secrets, keys, or certificates to your vault.
Integrate Key Vault with your application using Azure SDK or REST API.
Monitor usage and configure alerts for access or usage anomalies.
entry.whenToUse: Use Azure Key Vault to securely store and manage secrets, keys, or certificates for Azure-hosted or hybrid applications.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need on-premises-only key management or require a free tier without any billing risk.
entry.body: Azure Key Vault provides secure, centralized storage for secrets, keys, and certificates, supporting access control, auditing, and integration with Azure services.

entry.title: Clerk
entry.description: Clerk provides user authentication, authorization, and user management APIs for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier for up to 5,000 monthly active users with core authentication features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Clerk account.
Create a new application in the Clerk dashboard.
Configure allowed redirect URLs and authentication settings.
Install Clerk SDK in your app (e.g., via npm).
Integrate Clerk components or APIs into your frontend.
entry.whenToUse: Use Clerk when you need quick, secure user authentication and management for web or mobile apps with minimal backend setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Clerk if you require full on-premise control, advanced enterprise SSO, or need to support more than 5,000 free users.
entry.body: Clerk offers a generous free tier for authentication and user management, making it easy to add secure login to your applications.

entry.title: Cloud-IAM
entry.description: Cloud-IAM provides managed identity and access management services for cloud applications and APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic IAM features for small teams and projects.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Cloud-IAM account.
Create a new application in the dashboard.
Configure redirect URIs and authentication settings.
Integrate Cloud-IAM SDK or endpoints in your app.
Test user login and access flows.
entry.whenToUse: Use Cloud-IAM when you need simple, managed authentication and SSO for a small app or team.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced IAM features, custom policies, or support for large-scale enterprise deployments.
entry.body: Cloud-IAM offers a managed identity and access management platform with a free tier suitable for small projects needing basic authentication and SSO.

entry.title: Descope
entry.description: Descope provides passwordless authentication, user management, and security workflows for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 7,500 monthly active users with core authentication features.
caveats: Support is limited on free tier

useCases: Add passwordless login to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Descope account.
Create a new project in the Descope dashboard.
Configure authentication flows (e.g., passwordless, social login).
Integrate Descope SDK into your app using provided guides.
Test authentication and user management features.
entry.whenToUse: Use Descope when you need to quickly add secure, passwordless authentication and user management to your app without building from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premise deployment, advanced customization, or need to support more than 7,500 monthly users for free.
entry.body: Descope offers a developer-friendly platform for adding passwordless authentication, multi-factor authentication, and user management to web and mobile applications, with a generous free tier for small projects.

entry.title: Keybase
entry.description: Keybase offers secure messaging, file sharing, and team collaboration with end-to-end encryption.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free for all users with unlimited encrypted messaging and file sharing.
caveats: File storage limits apply per user and per team
No paid upgrade for higher limits

quickstartSteps: Go to https://keybase.io/ and sign up for a free account.
Download and install the Keybase app for your platform.
Verify your identity using social accounts or PGP.
Create or join a team for collaboration.
Start secure messaging or share files with your team.
entry.whenToUse: Use Keybase when you need secure, end-to-end encrypted messaging or file sharing for individuals or small teams.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require enterprise-level admin controls, integrations, or need to exceed storage limits.
entry.body: Keybase provides free, end-to-end encrypted messaging and file sharing for individuals and teams, with no paid plans or overage risk.

entry.title: Keywords AI
entry.description: AI-powered keyword research and clustering tool for SEO and content strategy.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes limited keyword clustering and research features.
limits: Up to 200 keyword credits per month
caveats: Unused credits do not roll over

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Keywords AI account.
Log in and navigate to the dashboard.
Enter your seed keywords to start a new project.
Review the generated keyword clusters and insights.
Export or copy results for your content planning.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need quick, AI-driven keyword clustering and research for SEO or content planning without manual analysis.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited keyword analysis, advanced integrations, or highly customized clustering beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: Keywords AI offers a free plan for AI-powered keyword research and clustering, ideal for small-scale SEO and content strategy projects.

entry.title: Kinde
entry.description: Kinde provides authentication, user management, and feature flagging for modern web and mobile apps.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes authentication, user management, and feature flags for up to 2,500 monthly active users.
caveats: Custom domains and advanced integrations require paid plans
Support is limited to email only

useCases: Add authentication to web or mobile apps
Implement feature flags for controlled rollouts
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Kinde account at kinde.com.
Create a new application in the Kinde dashboard.
Configure authentication settings and redirect URIs.
Integrate the Kinde SDK into your app using provided guides.
Test user signup, login, and feature flag functionality.
entry.whenToUse: Use Kinde when you need quick, scalable authentication and feature flagging for web or mobile apps without complex setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Kinde if you require on-premise hosting, advanced enterprise integrations, or need support for more than 2,500 monthly active users for free.
entry.body: Kinde offers a developer-friendly platform for authentication, user management, and feature flagging, with a generous free tier suitable for most small projects and startups.

entry.title: Okta
entry.description: Okta provides secure authentication, authorization, and user management for web and mobile applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Okta offers a free developer tier with limited active users and features.
caveats: Support is limited on free tier

useCases: Add secure login to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Okta developer account.
Create a new application in the Okta dashboard.
Configure authentication settings and redirect URIs.
Integrate Okta SDK or API into your app.
Test login and user flows.
entry.whenToUse: Use Okta when you need robust, scalable authentication and user management for your applications without building from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Okta if you require full control over authentication infrastructure or need advanced features only available on paid plans.
entry.body: Okta's free developer tier is ideal for adding secure authentication, SSO, and user management to applications, with generous limits for most small projects.

entry.title: Ory
entry.description: Ory provides open-source identity and access management services for authentication, authorization, and user management.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic authentication, user management, and up to 1,000 monthly active users.
caveats: No SLA or enterprise support on free tier

useCases: Add user authentication to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for an Ory Cloud account.
Create a new project in the Ory dashboard.
Configure authentication flows and user settings.
Integrate Ory SDK or APIs into your application.
Test user registration and login.
entry.whenToUse: Use Ory when you need secure, scalable authentication and user management for web or mobile applications with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Ory if you require on-premise enterprise features, advanced custom workflows, or need to support more than 1,000 users for free.
entry.body: Ory offers a robust, open-source authentication and authorization platform with a generous free tier, ideal for projects needing secure user management and modern identity protocols.

entry.title: Permit.io
entry.description: Permit.io provides a managed authorization service for fine-grained access control in your applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 1,000 monthly active users with core authorization features.

useCases: Implement RBAC or ABAC in web/mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Permit.io account.
Create a new project in the dashboard.
Define roles, resources, and permissions.
Integrate the Permit.io SDK into your application.
Test authorization flows using the dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Permit.io when you need to add robust, centralized authorization to your application without building it from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premises deployment, or need custom authorization logic not supported by Permit.io.
entry.body: Permit.io offers a managed authorization platform with a generous free tier, enabling teams to implement RBAC and ABAC quickly and securely.

entry.title: Phase Two
entry.description: Phase Two provides hosted, extensible identity and authentication services for modern SaaS applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes core authentication features for up to 100 monthly active users.
caveats: Support is community-based on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Phase Two account.
Create a new application in the dashboard.
Configure redirect URIs and authentication settings.
Integrate the SDK or use provided endpoints in your app.
Test authentication flow with a test user.
entry.whenToUse: Use Phase Two to quickly add authentication and SSO to your SaaS app without building identity infrastructure from scratch.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited users on the free tier or require advanced enterprise features without upgrading.
entry.body: Phase Two offers a managed identity platform with free authentication and SSO for up to 100 users, ideal for SaaS projects starting out.

entry.title: Portkey
entry.description: Portkey provides unified API management and observability for AI and LLM applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 10,000 requests per month with core observability and gateway features.
caveats: Support is community-based on free tier

useCases: Rate limiting and key management for LLMs
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Portkey account.
Create a new project in the Portkey dashboard.
Configure your LLM provider API keys in Portkey.
Update your application to use the Portkey endpoint as the LLM gateway.
Monitor requests and usage in the Portkey dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Portkey when you need to manage, monitor, and secure multiple LLM API integrations from a single gateway.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unlimited requests, advanced enterprise features, or direct LLM provider integration without a proxy.
entry.body: Portkey offers a free tier for managing and monitoring LLM API usage, ideal for small teams and early-stage AI projects.

entry.title: Scalekit
entry.description: Scalekit provides global edge hosting for static sites and serverless functions with automatic scaling and CDN integration.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes hosting for static sites and serverless functions with global CDN.
caveats: Custom domains may require paid plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Scalekit account.
Create a new project in the dashboard.
Connect your GitHub repository or upload your static files.
Configure build settings and environment variables if needed.
Deploy your site and access the provided edge URL.
entry.whenToUse: Use Scalekit for fast, global hosting of static sites or lightweight serverless APIs with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need heavy backend processing, large storage, or advanced networking features beyond static and serverless hosting.
entry.body: Scalekit offers global edge hosting for static sites and serverless functions, making it easy to deploy fast, scalable web projects with minimal configuration.

entry.title: SikkerKey
entry.description: SikkerKey provides secure, cloud-based password and secret management for teams and individuals.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic secret storage and sharing for individuals and small teams.
caveats: Advanced integrations and audit logs require paid plans
No priority support on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free SikkerKey account at sikkerkey.com.
Verify your email and log in to the dashboard.
Create your first vault and add secrets or passwords.
Invite up to 2 team members to collaborate.
Set access permissions for each secret as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use SikkerKey when you need a simple, secure way to manage and share secrets or passwords with a small team.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, large team support, or enterprise compliance features out of the box.
entry.body: SikkerKey offers a secure, cloud-based platform for storing and sharing secrets, suitable for individuals and small teams needing basic secret management.

entry.title: Smart Grow Vault
entry.description: Smart Grow Vault offers free, secure cloud storage for plant data, images, and notes for growers and hobbyists.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes secure storage for plant data, images, and notes.
caveats: No API access on free tier

useCases: Track and store plant growth data
quickstartSteps: Visit https://vault.smart-grow.app/ and sign up for a free account.
Log in and create your first plant entry.
Upload images and add notes for your plant.
Organize your plants and review stored data in your dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Smart Grow Vault to securely store and organize plant data, images, and notes for personal gardening or hobby projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need API access, team collaboration, or storage for non-plant-related data.
entry.body: Smart Grow Vault provides free, secure cloud storage for plant enthusiasts to organize and track their plant data, images, and notes with an easy-to-use interface.

entry.title: SuperTokens
entry.description: SuperTokens provides open source authentication with prebuilt UI, social login, and session management for web and mobile apps.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes core authentication features, unlimited users, and basic email/password and social login.
caveats: Enterprise features (SSO, multi-tenancy, advanced analytics) require paid plan
Support is community-based on free tier

useCases: Add authentication to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up at SuperTokens and create a new project.
Install the SuperTokens SDK in your backend and frontend apps.
Configure connection info and authentication recipes (e.g., email/password, social login).
Integrate SuperTokens UI components or build your own using provided APIs.
Test authentication flows locally and deploy to production.
entry.whenToUse: Use SuperTokens when you need quick, secure authentication with social login and session management for web or mobile apps.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced enterprise features like SSO or multi-tenancy on the free tier, or need extensive SLA-backed support.
entry.body: SuperTokens is an open source authentication solution offering prebuilt UI, social login, and secure session management for modern web and mobile applications.

entry.title: WorkOS
entry.description: WorkOS provides APIs and tools for adding enterprise authentication and directory sync to your SaaS app.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free for up to 1,000 monthly active users with core SSO and Directory Sync features.
caveats: Some advanced features require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a WorkOS account.
Create a new project in the WorkOS dashboard.
Configure your application's redirect URIs.
Integrate the WorkOS SDK or API into your app.
Test SSO or Directory Sync with a sample connection.
entry.whenToUse: Use WorkOS when you need to quickly add SSO or directory sync for enterprise customers in your SaaS application.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require a fully self-hosted auth solution or need advanced features beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: WorkOS offers developer-friendly APIs to add SSO, directory sync, and MFA to SaaS applications, with a generous free tier for early-stage teams.

entry.title: ZITADEL Cloud
entry.description: Managed cloud identity and access management with authentication, authorization, and user self-service features.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes up to 50,000 monthly active users and basic authentication features.

useCases: Add secure login to web or mobile apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free ZITADEL Cloud account.
Create a new project and configure your application.
Set up authentication methods (e.g., email, social login).
Integrate ZITADEL SDK or OIDC endpoints into your app.
Test user registration and login flows.
entry.whenToUse: Use ZITADEL Cloud when you need managed authentication, authorization, and user management for your apps without running your own identity server.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require on-premise deployment, advanced enterprise features, or strict SLAs on the free tier.
entry.body: ZITADEL Cloud provides managed identity and access management with modern authentication protocols, user self-service, and scalable free tier for app developers.

entry.title: Zoho Vault
entry.description: Zoho Vault is a cloud-based password manager for securely storing and sharing credentials with teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for personal use and small teams with basic password management features.

useCases: Securely store personal or team passwords
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Zoho Vault account at the official website.
Verify your email address and log in to your dashboard.
Create your first vault and set a strong master password.
Add passwords or import existing credentials.
Invite team members (up to 5 for free) and assign access permissions.
entry.whenToUse: Use Zoho Vault to securely manage and share passwords for individuals or small teams needing basic credential management.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced integrations, large team support, or enterprise-grade features without upgrading to a paid plan.
entry.body: Zoho Vault offers a secure, cloud-based password manager with a free tier for individuals and small teams, supporting unlimited password storage and basic sharing features.
